title: Thai Knowledge Entity
description: Schema for storing Thai localized knowledge entities (Geo, Law, History, etc.)

domain.description: The specific domain this knowledge belongs to

type.description: Sub-type within the domain (e.g., province, temple, act)

aliases.description: Alternative names, abbreviations, or common misspellings

description.description: Brief description or summary of the entity

attributes.description: Domain-specific JSON attributes (e.g., region, lat, lon)

relations.description: JSON map of relationships to other entities

source.description: List of reference sources for this knowledge

confidence.description: Confidence score of the information accuracy
